_status: partially populated (2026-07-07 second research pass) - see data-requirements.md §17 and ISSUES.md ISS-9

_usagePerDayRange.note: typical=23 is a real single-hospital Indian study (NIMS, tertiary teaching hospital -- a busy referral centre, may run higher than a typical smaller private setup). low/high=20/40 is global context (not India-specific).

billedTariffPerUse.note: MRI head/brain (plain) CGHS reimbursement ceiling -- a government-scheme floor, NOT a private cash tariff (private hospitals typically charge more). Other body parts price differently (e.g. MRI knee ~2380/2800, MRI head with contrast ~4250/5000) -- this field anchors to the plain head/brain baseline only. A stale (2013) private-hospital data point exists for context (S31): ~INR 2500, 13 years old, do not use as a current default.

launchDelayMonths.note: Converted from 6-10 weeks (civil work, RF shielding, magnet commissioning). Single vendor/supplier blog, not empirical. MRI does not require AERB licensing (non-ionizing).
